nodes.name: Fetch Whitelist from Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Sheet columns: A=Phone, B=Name, C=Tag(Client|Personal), D=Status(Active|Blocked)

nodes.name: Fetch Conversation Memory
nodes.notes: Fetches last 10 turns from Supabase. Table: conversation_memory (id, phone, role, content, created_at)

nodes.name: Groq AI Inference
nodes.notes: Direct Groq call — zero third-party wrappers. Pipeline: WhatsApp → n8n → Groq → WhatsApp

nodes.name: Throttle Wait
nodes.notes: Waits based on Groq reset header value before retrying

nodes.name: Send Reply via Evolution API
nodes.notes: Primary: Evolution API (self-hosted, zero per-conversation cost)

nodes.name: Save Turn to Memory
nodes.notes: Saves user + assistant turns to Supabase for 10-turn context window
